name: phpty/reline
description: A port of Ruby's Reline line editor: Unicode width, grapheme and key-input handling for PHP terminal programs.

suggest.ext-pcntl: For SIGWINCH/SIGCONT/SIGINT handling during the read loop; without it those signals are not serviced
suggest.phpty/screen-test: To drive Reline through a pty and assert on the rendered screen in tests
suggest.phpunit/phpunit: To run the ported test suite
suggest.yoast/phpunit-polyfills: For assertion compatibility across PHPUnit versions on PHP 7.4-8.x
